name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
description: These horseshoes come in a set of four. As a Magic action, you can touch one of the horseshoes to the hoof of a horse or similar creature, whereupon the horseshoe affixes itself to the hoof. Removing a horseshoe also takes a Magic action.

application.action: Touch horseshoe to hoof of horse or similar creature

effect_when_all_four_affixed.movement: Creature moves normally while floating 4 inches above surface
effect_when_all_four_affixed.terrain: Can cross or stand above nonsolid or unstable surfaces (water, lava, etc.)
effect_when_all_four_affixed.exhaustion: Can travel up to 12 hours a day without gaining Exhaustion levels from extended travel
